---
name: New KB entry
about: Propose adding a new entry to the knowledge base
title: "[kb] "
labels: kb-entry
---

## What are you proposing to add?

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] New tool-version YAML (e.g., `kb/tools/fsl-6.0.7.yml`)
- [ ] New lab fingerprint (`kb/labs/`)
- [ ] New methods-paper citation flagmap (`kb/citations/`)
- [ ] New date-version row(s) (`kb/dates/`)

## Source documentation

<!--
URL or DOI to authoritative reference. Must be authoritative — e.g., official
tool documentation, GitHub release notes, or a peer-reviewed paper. Forum
posts and blog entries are not sufficient.
-->

## Coverage scope

<!--
For tool-version YAMLs: what fraction of the tool's flags are you documenting?
Are there deliberate omissions? If so, why?
-->

## Curation notes

<!--
Provenance, edge cases, ambiguities encountered during curation. Anything a
future maintainer should know about how this entry was derived.
-->
